# Frontend Custom Agent

This agent is configured to handle frontend-related tasks in the MediVision project.

## Instructions

- Focus on editing files in the frontend/ directory only.
- Assist with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript development.
- Use available tools to modify, debug, and improve frontend code.
